scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @starter/api" "npm run dev -w @starter/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @starter/api && npm run build -w @starter/web
scripts.build:vercel: npm run prisma:generate -w @starter/api && npm run build -w @starter/api && npm run build:vercel -w @starter/web
scripts.db:setup: npm run prisma:generate -w @starter/api && npm run db:migrate -w @starter/api && npm run db:seed -w @starter/api
